item.title: Applying for PhDs
item.description: I’ve recently completed my Master of Science Degree in Mathematics at Instituto Superior Técnico, University of Lisbon. I’m happy to report that my thesis Vertex Superalgebras from Prefactorization Algebras earned the maximum possible grade of 20/20. I have begun applying for PhD positions! Feel free to reach out regarding possible PhD projects.

item.title: Welcome!
item.description: Welcome to my personal website! I’m interested in mathematics and its applications to physics and computer science. You can read more about me here or contact me at rmp at ruimp.com. I’m always happy to discuss anything math and science related.
